content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "最喜歡的食物",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你喜歡吃什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xǐhuān chī shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xi3huan1 chi1 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "What do you like to eat?",
          "translation_ko": "무엇을 먹는 것을 좋아하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我最喜歡吃滷肉飯，因為很香。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuì xǐhuān chī lǔròufàn, yīnwèi hěn xiāng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zui4 xi3huan1 chi1 lu3rou4fan4, yin1wei4 hen3 xiang1.",
          "translation_en": "I like braised pork rice the most because it's very fragrant.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 루로우판을 가장 좋아합니다. 향이 좋기 때문입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "滷肉飯口味比較重，你喜歡清淡的嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Lǔròufàn kǒuwèi bǐjiào zhòng, nǐ xǐhuān qīngdàn de ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Lu3rou4fan4 kou3wei4 bi3jiao4 zhong4, ni3 xi3huan1 qing1dan4 de ma?",
          "translation_en": "Braised pork rice is quite heavy in flavor. Do you like light flavors?",
          "translation_ko": "루로우판은 맛이 좀 진한 편인데, 담백한 것을 좋아하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我也喜歡清淡的，可是滷肉飯更好吃。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yě xǐhuān qīngdàn de, kěshì lǔròufàn gèng hǎochī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 ye3 xi3huan1 qing1dan4 de, ke3shi4 lu3rou4fan4 geng4 hao3chi1.",
          "translation_en": "I also like light flavors, but braised pork rice tastes better.",
          "translation_ko": "저도 담백한 것을 좋아하지만, 루로우판이 더 맛있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你喜歡吃辣的嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ xǐhuān chī là de ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 xi3huan1 chi1 la4 de ma?",
          "translation_en": "Then do you like spicy food?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 매운 음식을 좋아하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我不喜歡太辣的，一點點辣可以。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bù xǐhuān tài là de, yīdiǎndiǎn là kěyǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bu4 xi3huan1 tai4 la4 de, yi1dian3dian3 la4 ke3yi3.",
          "translation_en": "I don't like it too spicy; a little spicy is okay.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 너무 매운 것은 좋아하지 않습니다. 약간 매운 것은 괜찮습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is B's favorite food?",
          "question_ko": "B가 가장 좋아하는 음식은 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Braised pork rice", "Noodles", "Rice"],
          "options_ko": ["루로우판", "국수", "밥"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tones and the natural rhythm of the question and answer.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about your favorite food. What do you like to eat? Do you like spicy or light flavors?"
    },
    {
      "title": "飲料選擇",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，請問要喝什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn yào hē shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 yao4 he1 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, what would you like to drink?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 무엇을 드시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我想要一杯紅茶，半糖少冰。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng yào yī bēi hóngchá, bàn táng shǎo bīng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiang3 yao4 yi1 bei1 hong2cha2, ban4 tang2 shao3 bing1.",
          "translation_en": "I'd like a cup of black tea, half sugar, less ice.",
          "translation_ko": "홍차 한 잔, 당도 반, 얼음 적게 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，你比較喜歡甜的還是清淡的？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, nǐ bǐjiào xǐhuān tián de háishì qīngdàn de?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, ni3 bi3jiao4 xi3huan1 tian2 de hai2shi4 qing1dan4 de?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, do you prefer sweet or light flavors?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 단 것을 좋아하시나요, 담백한 것을 좋아하시나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我不喜歡太甜的，半糖剛剛好。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bù xǐhuān tài tián de, bàn táng gānggāng hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bu4 xi3huan1 tai4 tian2 de, ban4 tang2 gang1gang1 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "I don't like it too sweet; half sugar is just right.",
          "translation_ko": "너무 단 것은 좋아하지 않아서 반 당도가 딱 좋습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "那要不要加珍珠？",
          "pinyin": "Nà yào bù yào jiā zhēnzhū?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 yao4 bu4 yao4 jia1 zhen1zhu1?",
          "translation_en": "Then would you like to add boba pearls?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 타피오카 펄을 추가하시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不用了，謝謝。這樣就好。",
          "pinyin": "Bù yòng le, xièxiè. Zhèyàng jiù hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 yong4 le, xie4xie. Zhe4yang4 jiu4 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "No, thank you. This is fine.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮습니다, 감사합니다. 이대로 주세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What drink did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 어떤 음료를 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Black tea, half sugar, less ice", "Green tea, no sugar", "Coffee with milk"],
          "options_ko": ["홍차, 반 당도, 얼음 적게", "녹차, 무가당", "밀크 커피"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, paying attention to the polite tone and the order details.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Order a drink. Tell the staff what you want, including sweetness and ice level."
    },
    {
      "title": "活動選擇",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "這個週末你想做什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Zhège zhōumò nǐ xiǎng zuò shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4ge4 zhou1mo4 ni3 xiang3 zuo4 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "What do you want to do this weekend?",
          "translation_ko": "이번 주말에 무엇을 하고 싶으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我想去看電影，你呢？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng qù kàn diànyǐng, nǐ ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiang3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3, ni3 ne?",
          "translation_en": "I want to go see a movie. How about you?",
          "translation_ko": "영화 보러 가고 싶어요. 당신은요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我比較喜歡去公園散步，因為很安靜。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān qù gōngyuán sànbù, yīnwèi hěn ānjìng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bi3jiao4 xi3huan1 qu4 gong1yuan2 san4bu4, yin1wei4 hen3 an1jing4.",
          "translation_en": "I prefer going to the park for a walk because it's very quiet.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 공원에 산책 가는 것을 더 좋아합니다. 매우 조용하기 때문입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "你喜歡安靜的地方，我喜歡熱鬧的地方。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xǐhuān ānjìng de dìfang, wǒ xǐhuān rènào de dìfang.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xi3huan1 an1jing4 de di4fang, wo3 xi3huan1 re4nao4 de di4fang.",
          "translation_en": "You like quiet places; I like lively places.",
          "translation_ko": "당신은 조용한 곳을 좋아하고, 저는 번화한 곳을 좋아합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那我們可以選一個兩個人都喜歡的活動嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nà wǒmen kěyǐ xuǎn yīge liǎng gè rén dōu xǐhuān de huódòng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 wo3men ke3yi3 xuan3 yi1ge liang3 ge4 ren2 dou1 xi3huan1 de huo2dong4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Then can we choose an activity that both of us like?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 우리 둘 다 좋아하는 활동을 고를 수 있을까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊，我們先去吃飯，然後再看電影，怎麼樣？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, wǒmen xiān qù chīfàn, ránhòu zài kàn diànyǐng, zěnme yàng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a, wo3men xian1 qu4 chi1fan4, ran2hou4 zai4 kan4 dian4ying3, zen3me yang4?",
          "translation_en": "Sure, let's eat first, then watch a movie. How about that?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 먼저 밥을 먹고, 그다음에 영화를 보는 게 어떨까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "聽起來不錯，就這麼決定吧。",
          "pinyin": "Tīng qǐlai bùcuò, jiù zhème juédìng ba.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ting1 qi3lai bu4cuo4, jiu4 zhe4me jue2ding4 ba.",
          "translation_en": "Sounds good, let's decide that way.",
          "translation_ko": "좋네요, 그렇게 결정합시다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What activity does A prefer?",
          "question_ko": "A는 어떤 활동을 더 선호합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Going to the park for a walk", "Watching a movie", "Eating at a restaurant"],
          "options_ko": ["공원에 산책 가기", "영화 보기", "식당에서 식사하기"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the intonation of suggestions and preferences.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Talk about your weekend plans. What do you like to do? Do you prefer quiet or lively activities?"
    }
  ]
}
